Data exports: Memory synthesis and chat summaries are included in standard conversation history exports. Incognito chats are included in organizational data exports. All exported chat summaries remain tied to their source conversations. Team plan limitations Team plans do not have organization-level controls for memory features. Individual Team plan members manage their own memory settings directly.
